hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息；【FINANCE】贝莱德借鉴对冲基金策略，将其应用于交易所交易基金；【FINANCE】中国“积极努力”推动伊朗停火背后：商业胜过政治。

items.title: Fed officials still foresee rate cut this year, despite war impacts, minutes show
items.summary: Policymakers said they would need to remain "nimble" as they weighed the impact the war had on inflation.
items.title_zh: 会议纪要显示，尽管受到战争影响，美联储官员仍预计今年降息
items.summary_zh: 政策制定者表示，在权衡战争对通胀的影响时，他们需要保持“灵活”。

items.title: BlackRock rips page from hedge fund playbook, applies it to exchange-traded funds
items.summary: BlackRock's Jeffrey Rosenberg has a leading role in the firm's liquid alt ETFs — which use a long-short strategy in ETF wrappers.
items.title_zh: 贝莱德借鉴对冲基金策略，将其应用于交易所交易基金
items.summary_zh: 贝莱德 (BlackRock) 的杰弗里·罗森伯格 (Jeffrey Rosenberg) 在该公司的流动性替代 ETF 中发挥着主导作用，该 ETF 在 ETF 包装中使用多空策略。

items.title: Behind China's 'active efforts' for an Iran ceasefire: Business trumps politics
items.summary: The big risk for Beijing is that the Iran war drags down global demand for the exports that are driving China's economic growth.
items.title_zh: 中国“积极努力”推动伊朗停火背后：商业胜过政治
items.summary_zh: 北京面临的最大风险是伊朗战争拖累了全球对推动中国经济增长的出口需求。

items.title: Clarity Act returns to U.S. Senate, Bank earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
items.summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting April 13.
items.title_zh: 《清晰法案》重返美国参议院，银行收益：未来加密货币周
items.summary_zh: 看看从 4 月 13 日开始的一周将会发生什么。

items.title: Offbeat Wall Street research firm says it sent an analyst to Strait of Hormuz. Here's what they learned
items.summary: Before the U.S and Israel began their war against Iran, about 20% of the world's oil was shipped through the narrow Strait of Hormuz.
items.title_zh: 另类华尔街研究公司表示，已派出一名分析师前往霍尔木兹海峡。这是他们学到的
items.summary_zh: 在美国和以色列对伊朗发动战争之前，世界上大约 20% 的石油是通过狭窄的霍尔木兹海峡运输的。

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Oil Climbs Back Above $100 as U.S. Plans Hormuz Blockade
items.summary: The U.S. said it would block ships entering or exiting Iranian ports or coastal areas starting at 10 a.m. Eastern on Monday. It was unclear how that would affect the cease-fire.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：美国计划封锁霍尔木兹，油价重回 100 美元上方
items.summary_zh: 美国表示，将从周一东部时间上午 10 点开始阻止船只进出伊朗港口或沿海地区。目前尚不清楚这将如何影响停火。

items.title: Bitcoin hits a wall – the chart just challenged the $88,000 bull case
items.summary: The price action is sending a clear warning signal that analysts' optimism may be running ahead of itself.
items.title_zh: 比特币碰壁——图表刚刚挑战了 88,000 美元的牛市情况
items.summary_zh: 价格走势发出了明确的警告信号，表明分析师的乐观情绪可能有些过头了。

items.title: Strategy signals another bitcoin buy as company needs just 2% annual BTC growth to cover dividends
items.summary: The company bought nearly three times more bitcoin than miners produced in March and is signaling it isn't done, even as its holdings remain billions underwater.
items.title_zh: 策略表明公司将再次购买比特币，因为公司只需 2% 的年度比特币增长即可支付股息
items.summary_zh: 该公司购买的比特币比三月份矿商生产的比特币多了近三倍，并暗示它还没有完成，尽管其持有的比特币仍处于水下数十亿美元。

items.title: Research with ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to research with ChatGPT using search and deep research to find up-to-date information, analyze sources, and generate structured insights.
items.title_zh: 使用 ChatGPT 进行研究
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 进行研究，使用搜索和深入研究来查找最新信息、分析来源并生成结构化见解。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Goldman Sachs is set to report first-quarter earnings — here's what Wall Street expects
items.summary: Trading desks across Wall Street have been busy at the start of the year as institutional investors set new positions against the churn of AI-led disruption.
items.title_zh: 高盛将公布第一季度收益——这是华尔街的预期
items.summary_zh: 今年年初，随着机构投资者设立新头寸以应对人工智能主导的颠覆，华尔街的交易柜台一直很忙碌。

items.title: How bond market's private credit crisis fears are playing out in fixed-income ETFs
items.summary: Fears of a private credit crisis arrived just as the growing and less transparent bond market was being included in more fixed-income ETFs.
items.title_zh: 债券市场对私人信贷危机的担忧如何在固定收益 ETF 中体现
items.summary_zh: 就在越来越多且透明度较低的债券市场被纳入更多固定收益 ETF 之际，对私人信贷危机的担忧也随之而来。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's still betting against Palantir after Trump post boosts stock
items.summary: The investor of the "Big Short" fame said he continues to hold long-dated put options on the artificial intelligence software firm.
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在特朗普帖子提振股价后，他仍然看空 Palantir
items.summary_zh: 这位以“大空头”闻名的投资者表示，他继续持有这家人工智能软件公司的长期看跌期权。

items.title: Trump's threat raises risks and leaves predicaments unchanged
items.summary: The conflict is now a test of wills - Iran’s capacity to absorb strikes versus Trump’s tolerance for the war's costs.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的威胁增加了风险，但困境没有改变
items.summary_zh: 这场冲突现在是一场意志的考验——伊朗承受打击的能力与特朗普对战争成本的容忍度。

items.title: Trump attacks Pope over criticism of Iran war
items.summary: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".
items.title_zh: 特朗普因批评伊朗战争而攻击教皇
items.summary_zh: 美国总统指责利奥“在犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策方面糟糕”。

items.title: Eight to be awarded for bravery in Bondi Junction stabbing
items.summary: Six people were killed and ten injured after a man went on a stabbing rampage in an Australian mall.
items.title_zh: 八人因在邦迪交界处刺伤事件中表现英勇而获奖
items.summary_zh: 一名男子在澳大利亚一家购物中心持刀行凶，造成六人死亡、十人受伤。

items.title: Orban Loss May Ease Hungary’s Tensions with European Union
items.summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban has stymied the European Union for years, and particularly in recent months. Peter Magyar’s election could change that, if only so much.
items.title_zh: 欧尔班下台可能会缓解匈牙利与欧盟的紧张关系
items.summary_zh: 总理维克托·欧尔班多年来一直阻碍欧盟，尤其是最近几个月。彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）的当选可能会改变这一点，但幅度有限。

items.title: After Chaotic Election Day, Peru Orders 2nd Day of Voting for Some Areas
items.summary: Frustrated voters in long lines were unable to cast ballots in parts of the capital, Lima, due to logistical failures, eroding trust for some in the process.
items.title_zh: 混乱的选举日过后，秘鲁下令部分地区进行第二天投票
items.summary_zh: 由于后勤故障，沮丧的选民排长队无法在首都利马的部分地区投票，从而削弱了一些人的信任。

items.title: Hungary Election Results: Viktor Orban Concedes Defeat and Congratulates Peter Magyar
items.summary: Prime Minister Viktor Orban, who has inspired populist movements globally, could not overcome the growing dissatisfaction of his own citizens.
items.title_zh: 匈牙利选举结果：维克多·欧尔班承认失败并祝贺彼得·马扎尔
items.summary_zh: 总理欧尔班维克托在全球范围内激发了民粹主义运动，但他无法克服本国公民日益增长的不满情绪。

items.title: Who Is Peter Magyar, the Man Who Toppled Hungary’s Orban
items.summary: Mr. Magyar’s success in the Hungarian election is fueled in large part by widespread public anger at corruption and concern about sluggish economic growth.
items.title_zh: 谁是彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar），推翻匈牙利欧尔班的人
items.summary_zh: 马扎尔在匈牙利选举中取得成功，很大程度上是由于公众对腐败的普遍愤怒以及对经济增长乏力的担忧。

items.title: In Pakistan Talks, Iran Saw a U.S. Trying to Dictate, Not Negotiate
items.summary: Iran sees American demands as reaching far beyond what the United States achieved in war. Tehran is gambling that it can withstand further bombardment more than Washington is willing to sustain economic chaos, experts say.
items.title_zh: 在巴基斯坦谈判中，伊朗看到美国试图发号施令，而不是谈判
items.summary_zh: 伊朗认为美国的要求远远超出了美国在战争中取得的成就。专家表示，德黑兰赌的是自己能够承受进一步的轰炸，而华盛顿却不愿意维持经济混乱。

items.title: Bank of Korea calls for ‘circuit breaker’ in local crypto market, citing Bithumb incident
items.summary: The BOK called for stricter internal control regulations for local crypto exchanges, citing Bithumb's mistaken transfer of 620,000 BTC.
items.title_zh: 韩国央行以 Bithumb 事件为由呼吁对当地加密货币市场进行“熔断”
items.summary_zh: 韩国央行以 Bithumb 错误转移 620,000 BTC 为由，呼吁对当地加密货币交易所实施更严格的内部控制规定。

items.title: ECB backs EU plan to centralize crypto supervision under Paris-based ESMA watchdog: Reuters
items.summary: The ECB warned that ESMA must receive adequate staffing and funding, and recommended a phased transition to avoid disruption.
items.title_zh: 欧洲央行支持欧盟计划在总部位于巴黎的 ESMA 监管机构下集中监管加密货币：路透社
items.summary_zh: 欧洲央行警告称，ESMA必须获得足够的人员和资金，并建议分阶段过渡以避免中断。

items.title: Bitwise files second amendment to Hyperliquid ETF, adds Wintermute and Flowdesk as trading counterparties
items.summary: The filing comes a day after Bitwise Europe listed a physically-backed Hyperliquid staking ETP on Deutsche Börse Xetra.
items.title_zh: Bitwise 对 Hyperliquid ETF 提交第二次修订，将 Wintermute 和 Flowdesk 添加为交易对手方
items.summary_zh: 该文件发布前一天，Bitwise Europe 在德意志交易所 Xetra 上市了实物支持的 Hyperliquid 质押 ETP。

items.title: Using projects in ChatGPT
items.summary: Learn how to use orojects in ChatGPT to organize chats, files, and instructions, manage ongoing work, and collaborate more effectively.
items.title_zh: 在 ChatGPT 中使用项目
items.summary_zh: 了解如何使用 ChatGPT 中的项目来组织聊天、文件和说明、管理正在进行的工作以及更有效地协作。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Preview tool helps makers visualize 3D-printed objects
items.summary: By quickly generating aesthetically accurate previews of fabricated objects, the VisiPrint system could make prototyping faster and less wasteful.
items.title_zh: 预览工具可帮助创客可视化 3D 打印物体
items.summary_zh: 通过快速生成美观准确的预制件预览，VisiPrint 系统可以加快原型制作速度并减少浪费。

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: Alibaba leads $290 million investment for building a new kind of AI model as LLM limits emerge
items.summary: Startup Shengshu plans to use the money for a "general world model," paving the way for more practical robot applications.
items.title_zh: 随着 LLM 限制的出现，阿里巴巴领投 2.9 亿美元用于构建新型人工智能模型
items.summary_zh: 初创公司盛树计划将这笔资金用于“通用世界模型”，为更实际的机器人应用铺平道路。

items.title: Bitcoin hit by $20 million-an-hour selling pressure above $70,000
items.summary: Bitcoin has once again seen heavy profit-taking above $70,000, according to Glassnode.
items.title_zh: 比特币每小时 2000 万美元的抛售压力超过 70,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 根据 Glassnode 的数据，比特币再次在 70,000 美元上方出现大量获利了结。

items.title: Attacker mints $1 billion Polkadot tokens on Ethereum, ends up stealing just $250,000
items.summary: A forged cross-chain message bypassed state proof validation on the bridge contract, granting admin control over the bridged DOT token and allowing the attacker to mint and dump the entire supply for $237,000.
items.title_zh: 攻击者在以太坊上铸造了 10 亿美元的 Polkadot 代币，最终只窃取了 25 万美元
items.summary_zh: 伪造的跨链消息绕过了桥接合约上的状态证明验证，授予了对桥接 DOT 代币的管理员控制权，并允许攻击者以 237,000 美元的价格铸造和转储整个供应量。

items.title: Bitcoin slides to $71,000 after Trump’s blockade order in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: High-level negotiations between the US and Iran failed to reach a meaningful resolution earlier on Sunday.
items.title_zh: 特朗普封锁霍尔木兹海峡后比特币跌至 71,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 周日早些时候，美国和伊朗之间的高层谈判未能达成有意义的解决方案。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.

items.title: Evaluating the ethics of autonomous systems
items.summary: MIT researchers developed a testing framework that pinpoints situations where AI decision-support systems are not treating people and communities fairly.

items.title: Ray Dalio: Trump-Xi meeting to focus on trade, capital flows
items.summary: Bridgewater founder Ray Dalio told CNBC he is optimistic about the outcome of a meeting between the U.S. and Chinese presidents next month.
items.title_zh: 雷·达里奥：特习会聚焦贸易和资本流动
items.summary_zh: 桥水基金创始人雷·达里奥 (Ray Dalio) 告诉 CNBC，他对下个月中美两国元首会晤的结果持乐观态度。

items.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in annual letter cites risks in geopolitics, AI and private markets
items.summary: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon in his annual letter to shareholders noted the country's 250th anniversary and called for a broad recommitment to American ideals.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通首席执行官杰米戴蒙在年度信中提到了地缘政治、人工智能和私募市场的风险

items.title: Orbán era swept away by Péter Magyar's Hungary election landslide
items.summary: Viktor Orbán's 16-year rule is over, defeated by a 45-year-old ex-party insider who convinced a majority of Hungarians to oust him.
items.title_zh: 欧尔班时代被彼得·马扎尔（Péter Magyar）在匈牙利选举中的压倒性胜利所取代
items.summary_zh: 欧尔班·维克多 (Viktor Orbán) 16 年的统治结束了，他被一位 45 岁的前党内人士击败，并说服大多数匈牙利人将他赶下台。

items.title: Katya Adler: Jubilation in Budapest will be felt in Europe but leaves Moscow cold
items.summary: European leaders share Hungarians' joy over the ousting of Vladimir Putin's EU ally, writes the BBC's Europe editor.
items.title_zh: 卡蒂亚·阿德勒：欧洲将感受到布达佩斯的欢乐，但莫斯科却感到寒冷
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司欧洲编辑写道，欧洲领导人与匈牙利人一样，对弗拉基米尔·普京的欧盟盟友被驱逐感到高兴。

items.title: Britney Spears goes into rehab after driving under the influence arrest
items.summary: The singer voluntarily checks herself into a treatment facility, three weeks before her court date.
items.title_zh: 布兰妮·斯皮尔斯酒后驾车被捕后进入康复中心
items.summary_zh: 在出庭日期前三周，这位歌手自愿住进治疗机构。

items.title: Carney on verge of Liberal majority government as votes cast in three by-elections
items.summary: One more seat could solidify the Canadian PM's hold on power after several Conservatives defected.
items.title_zh: 卡尼在三场补选中投票，处于自由党多数政府边缘
items.summary_zh: 在几名保守党人叛逃后，再多一个席位可能会巩固加拿大总理的权力。

items.title: Leading candidate quits California governor race amid sexual misconduct claims
items.summary: Top Democratic allies intensified pressure on him to exit the gubernatorial race.
items.title_zh: 领先候选人因性行为不当指控退出加州州长竞选
items.summary_zh: 民主党的高级盟友加大了对他的压力，要求他退出州长竞选。

items.title: The Dutch village at risk of being demolished
items.summary: Moerdijk has been earmarked for removal, to make way for a vast electricity substation.
items.title_zh: 荷兰村庄面临被拆除的危险
items.summary_zh: 莫尔代克已被指定拆除，为一座大型变电站让路。

items.title: Crowds gather ahead of Bollywood legend Asha Bhosle's funeral
items.summary: The singer, who died at the age of 92, will be cremated with full state honours on Monday.
items.title_zh: 人群聚集在宝莱坞传奇人物阿莎·博斯勒的葬礼前
items.summary_zh: 这位享年 92 岁的歌手将于周一以国家荣誉火葬。

items.title: In Myanmar, Even Flowers Stoke Fear
items.summary: Myanmar’s generals have brutalized the country for decades. But they have come to dread garlands as a sign of resistance.
items.title_zh: 在缅甸，连鲜花都会引发恐惧
items.summary_zh: 几十年来，缅甸将军们一直残暴地对待这个国家。但他们开始害怕花环作为抵抗的标志。

items.title: Pope Leo Heads to Africa to Meet the Future of Catholicism
items.summary: On a four-country tour of the continent, where the faith is growing faster than anywhere else, the pontiff will be greeted by enthusiastic crowds and authoritarian leaders.
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥前往非洲迎接天主教的未来
items.summary_zh: 在非洲大陆四个国家的访问中，那里的信仰增长速度比其他任何地方都快，教宗将受到热情的人群和独裁领导人的欢迎。

items.title: ‘The Strangest Sleepover Ever’: Dutch Skeptical as Their Royals Visit Trump
items.summary: The Dutch king and queen are set to stay at the White House on Monday night. At a time of trans-Atlantic tension, the Netherlands isn’t sure how it feels about that.
items.title_zh: “有史以来最奇怪的过夜”：荷兰皇室成员拜访特朗普时持怀疑态度
items.summary_zh: 荷兰国王和王后定于周一晚上入住白宫。在跨大西洋局势紧张之际，荷兰不确定对此有何感受。

items.title: Aiming at China, Malaysia Puts New Restrictions on Electric Cars
items.summary: The move was a tacit acknowledgment of China’s dominance in the global market and the power of its automakers to keep prices low.
items.title_zh: 瞄准中国 马来西亚对电动汽车设新限制
items.summary_zh: 此举是对中国在全球市场的主导地位以及中国汽车制造商保持低价的力量的默认。

items.summary: This is a summary of links recently featured on Quantocracy as of Sunday, 03/29/2026. To see our most recent links, visit the Quant Mashup. Read on readers! Brave New Backtest [Robot Wealth] My last two articles on AI and trading research got more engagement than almost anything
items.title_zh: 截至 2026 年 3 月 29 日，来自 Quantocracy 的最新量化链接
items.summary_zh: 这是截至 2026 年 3 月 29 日星期日 Quantocracy 上最近推荐的链接的摘要。要查看我们最新的链接，请访问 Quant Mashup。请读者阅读！勇敢的新回测 [机器人财富] 我最近两篇关于人工智能和交易研究的文章几乎比任何其他文章都受到了更多的关注

items.title: Alameda moves $16 million in Solana's SOL token for possible creditor distribution
items.summary: Alameda unstakes $16 million worth of Solana's SOL token, according to Arkham.
items.title_zh: Alameda 转移 1600 万美元的 Solana SOL 代币用于可能的债权人分配
items.summary_zh: 据 Arkham 称，Alameda 抵押了价值 1600 万美元的 Solana SOL 代币。

items.title: Aave passes landmark vote ending months-long fight over protocol revenue control
items.summary: The proposal directs 100% of application and product revenue back to AAVE token holders, resolving a governance dispute that began when swap fees were quietly redirected away from the DAO treasury in late 2025.
items.title_zh: Aave 通过具有里程碑意义的投票，结束了长达数月的协议收入控制之争
items.summary_zh: 该提案将 100% 的应用程序和产品收入返还给 AAVE 代币持有者，解决了因 2025 年底互换费用悄悄从 DAO 金库转移而引发的治理纠纷。

items.title: WLFI threatens legal action against Justin Sun after he accuses Trump-linked project of deceptive DeFi deals
items.summary: Trump-backed crypto project says it has ‘contracts’ and ‘evidence’ after Sun accused it of exploiting users.
items.title_zh: 孙宇晨 (Justin Sun) 指控特朗普相关项目进行欺骗性 DeFi 交易，WLFI 威胁对他采取法律行动
items.summary_zh: 特朗普支持的加密项目在 Sun 指控其剥削用户后表示，它有“合同”和“证据”。

items.title: CFTC Chair Mike Selig argues for agency's 'exclusive regulatory authority' in prediction markets fight: State of Crypto
items.summary: Selig said states do not have the ability to police prediction market providers, echoing his agency's stance as it pursues court cases to cement its authority.
items.title_zh: CFTC 主席迈克·塞利格 (Mike Selig) 主张该机构在预测市场之争中拥有“独家监管权”：加密货币现状
items.summary_zh: 塞利格表示，各州没有能力监管预测市场提供商，这呼应了该机构在提起诉讼以巩固其权威时的立场。

items.title: DeFi’s shakeout is a stress test, not a death sentence
items.summary: Novozhenov argues that despite lingering governance, security and regulatory hurdles that have shuttered several protocols, DeFi remains resilient.
items.title_zh: DeFi的洗牌是压力测试，而不是死刑
items.summary_zh: Novozhenov 认为，尽管治理、安全和监管障碍挥之不去，导致多个协议关闭，但 DeFi 仍然具有弹性。

items.title: Attacker exploits Polkadot-based Hyperbridge to mint 1 billion bridged DOT, nets $237K
items.summary: Upbit and Bithumb have since temporarily suspended deposits and withdrawals of Polkadot's DOT, citing signs of a security incident.
items.title_zh: 攻击者利用基于 Polkadot 的 Hyperbridge 铸造 10 亿个桥接 DOT，净赚 23.7 万美元
items.summary_zh: 此后，Upbit 和 Bithumb 以存在安全事件迹象为由，暂时停止了 Polkadot 的 DOT 充值和提现。

items.title: Fake Ledger app on App Store drains American musician’s 5.9 BTC
items.summary: Garrett Dutton, also known as G. Love, lost 5.9 BTC after entering his seed phrase in an imposter Ledger app.
items.title_zh: App Store 上的假 Ledger 应用耗尽了美国音乐家的 5.9 BTC
items.summary_zh: Garrett Dutton（又名 G. Love）在冒名顶替的 Ledger 应用程序中输入助记词后损失了 5.9 BTC。

items.title: Aave DAO approves $25 million Aave Labs funding grant in binding ‘Aave Will Win’ vote
items.summary: The Aave Chan Initiative cast the largest dissenting vote on the proposal, in line with founder Marc Zeller's prior opposition to Aave's actions.
items.title_zh: Aave DAO 批准 Aave Labs 2500 万美元资助，以具有约束力的“Aave Will Win”投票
items.summary_zh: Aave Chan Initiative 对该提案投出了最多的反对票，这与创始人 Marc Zeller 此前反对 Aave 行动的立场一致。

items.title: FBI says crypto-related fraud losses hit record $11.4 billion in 2025, with seniors bearing the brunt
items.summary: Americans 60 and older accounted for $4.4 billion of those crypto losses across 44,555 complaints, nearly double the next-closest age group.
items.title_zh: FBI 称 2025 年与加密货币相关的欺诈损失将达到创纪录的 114 亿美元，老年人首当其冲
items.summary_zh: 在 44,555 起投诉中，60 岁及以上的美国人在加密货币损失中造成了 44 亿美元，几乎是第二接近年龄组的两倍。

items.title: ‘See you in court’: WLFI threatens Justin Sun after he alleges hidden blacklist backdoor in token contract
items.summary: Sun called himself "the first and single largest victim" of World Liberty's blacklist, referencing his own wallet which has been frozen since Sep. 2025.
items.title_zh: “法庭见”：WLFI 威胁孙宇晨，指控代币合约中隐藏黑名单后门
items.summary_zh: 孙称自己是世界自由组织黑名单的“第一个也是最大的受害者”，他提到自己的钱包自 2025 年 9 月以来一直被冻结。

items.title: Ether Machine and Dynamix mutually scrap SPAC merger, blame ‘unfavorable market conditions’
items.summary: Under the Termination Agreement effective April 8, an unnamed "Payor" likely connected to The Ether Machine must pay Dynamix $50 million within 15 days.
items.title_zh: Ether Machine 和 Dynamix 相互放弃 SPAC 合并，归咎于“不利的市场条件”
items.summary_zh: 根据 4 月 8 日生效的终止协议，可能与 The Ether Machine 有关的未透露姓名的“付款人”必须在 15 天内向 Dynamix 支付 5000 万美元。

items.title: ChatGPT for finance teams
items.summary: Learn how finance teams use ChatGPT to streamline reporting, analyze data, improve forecasts, and communicate insights more clearly.
items.title_zh: 面向财务团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解财务团队如何使用 ChatGPT 简化报告、分析数据、改进预测并更清晰地传达见解。

items.title: Financial services
items.summary: Explore AI resources for financial services, including prompt packs, GPTs, guides, and tools to help institutions deploy and scale AI securely.
items.title_zh: 金融服务
items.summary_zh: 探索金融服务的人工智能资源，包括提示包、GPT、指南和工具，以帮助机构安全地部署和扩展人工智能。

items.title: Responsible and safe use of AI
items.summary: Learn how to use AI responsibly with best practices for safety, accuracy, and transparency when using tools like ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 负责任且安全地使用人工智能
items.summary_zh: 了解在使用 ChatGPT 等工具时如何负责任地使用人工智能以及实现安全性、准确性和透明度的最佳实践。

items.title: Prompting fundamentals
items.summary: Learn prompting fundamentals and how to write clear, effective prompts to get better, more useful responses from ChatGPT.
items.title_zh: 提示基础知识
items.summary_zh: 学习提示基础知识以及如何编写清晰、有效的提示，以便从 ChatGPT 获得更好、更有用的回复。

items.title: ChatGPT for managers
items.summary: Learn how managers use ChatGPT to prepare for conversations, write clear feedback, stay organized, and improve team effectiveness.
items.title_zh: 面向经理的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解经理如何使用 ChatGPT 准备对话、撰写清晰的反馈、保持条理并提高团队效率。

items.title: ChatGPT for customer success teams
items.summary: Learn how customer success teams use ChatGPT to manage accounts, improve communication, reduce churn, and drive adoption and renewals.
items.title_zh: 面向客户成功团队的 ChatGPT
items.summary_zh: 了解客户成功团队如何使用 ChatGPT 来管理帐户、改善沟通、减少客户流失以及推动采用和续订。

items.title: Waypoint-1.5: Higher-Fidelity Interactive Worlds for Everyday GPUs
items.title_zh: Waypoint-1.5：适用于日常 GPU 的更高保真度交互世界

items.title: ALTK‑Evolve: On‑the‑Job Learning for AI Agents
items.title_zh: ALTK‑Evolve：AI 代理的在职学习

items.title: Safetensors is Joining the PyTorch Foundation
items.title_zh: Safetensors 加入 PyTorch 基金会

items.title: Welcome Gemma 4: Frontier multimodal intelligence on device
items.title_zh: 欢迎 Gemma 4：设备上的前沿多模式智能

items.title: Holo3: Breaking the Computer Use Frontier
items.title_zh: Holo3：打破计算机使用前沿

items.title: Falcon Perception
items.title_zh: 猎鹰感知

items.title: Any Custom Frontend with Gradio's Backend
items.title_zh: 任何带有 Gradio 后端的自定义前端

items.title: Granite 4.0 3B Vision: Compact Multimodal Intelligence for Enterprise Documents
items.title_zh: Granite 4.0 3B Vision：企业文档的紧凑型多模式智能

items.title: New ways to balance cost and reliability in the Gemini API
items.summary: Google is introducing two new inference tiers to the Gemini API, Flex and Priority, to balance cost and latency.
items.title_zh: Gemini API 中平衡成本和可靠性的新方法
items.summary_zh: Google 正在为 Gemini API 引入两个新的推理层：Flex 和 Priority，以平衡成本和延迟。

items.title: Create, edit and share videos at no cost in Google Vids
items.summary: New AI capabilities are coming to Google Vids, powered by Lyria 3 and Veo 3.1, like high-quality video generation at no cost and more.
items.title_zh: 在 Google Vids 中免费创建、编辑和分享视频
items.summary_zh: 由 Lyria 3 和 Veo 3.1 提供支持的 Google Vids 即将推出新的 AI 功能，例如免费生成高质量视频等。

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.title_zh: 我们正在创建新的卫星图像地图，以帮助保护巴西的森林。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌与巴西政府合作开发卫星图像地图，以帮助保护该国的森林。

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Sixteen new START.nano companies are developing hard-tech solutions with the support of MIT.nano
items.summary: Startup accelerator program grows to over 30 companies, almost half of them with MIT pedigrees.
items.title_zh: 十六家新的 START.nano 公司正在 MIT.nano 的支持下开发硬技术解决方案
items.summary_zh: 创业加速器计划已发展到超过 30 家公司，其中几乎一半拥有 MIT 出身。

items.title: Working to advance the nuclear renaissance
items.summary: Dean Price, assistant professor in the Department of Nuclear Science and Engineering, sees a bright future for nuclear power, and believes AI can help us realize that vision.
items.title_zh: 致力于推进核复兴
items.summary_zh: 核科学与工程系助理教授 Dean Price 看到了核电的光明前景，并相信人工智能可以帮助我们实现这一愿景。

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。
